name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title loans and secured lines of credit using vehicle titles as collateral, plus unsecured personal loans for emergency cash needs.
description_long:
TitleMax is an established emergency lending provider with a physical presence across multiple states, including a Memphis location on Summer Avenue that has operated since February 2007. The company specializes in title-secured loans and lines of credit, allowing borrowers to leverage their vehicle's equity for quick access to cash without relying solely on credit scores. In addition to title pledges, TitleMax offers unsecured flexible lines of credit and in-store/online personal loans, providing multiple pathways to emergency funding.

The Memphis TN 9 location offers three primary products: (1) Title Pledge & Flex Line of Credit—secured loans using a clear vehicle title, with same-day approval and the ability to keep driving; (2) Unsecured Flexible Line of Credit—available online and in-store for customers in select states, requiring only valid ID, recent bank statements, and proof of income; and (3) In-store and online personal loans. The store is bilingual and operates extended hours (9am–7pm most weekdays, closed Sundays). Requirements are minimal: a valid government-issued ID, vehicle title (for pledges), and active bank account or proof of income.

TitleMax differentiates itself through competitive rates, acceptance of most credit types, same-day cash disbursement, and a flexible line-of-credit model allowing customers to withdraw funds all at once or incrementally. The Memphis location has accumulated 481+ Google reviews with a 5.0/5 average rating, with multiple customer testimonials praising specific staff members (Nicole, Joyce, Johnathan) for professionalism and knowledge. The company operates multiple nearby locations (N Cleveland Street, Lamar Ave, Jackson Avenue), providing convenience for the Memphis area.

However, TitleMax is a title lending company, which inherently involves secured debt tied to vehicle ownership—a meaningful caveat for borrowers with limited transportation options. While the website emphasizes competitive rates and most-credit-types-accepted messaging, specific APRs are not disclosed on this location page. The company's focus on vehicle-secured loans means non-vehicle owners are limited to unsecured personal loans, which may carry higher rates. Customers should carefully review loan terms and repayment obligations before committing, as defaulting on a title loan risks vehicle repossession.
address: 901 N Interstate Hwy 35 C, Round Rock, TX 78664

pros: Same-day cash approval and disbursement for title pledges
Accepts most credit types—credit score not primary qualification factor
Flexible line of credit allows withdrawal all at once or incrementally up to credit limit
Keep driving your vehicle while using it as collateral for title pledges
Bilingual staff and extended hours (9am–7pm weekdays, 9am–4pm Saturday)
481+ Google reviews with 5.0/5 average rating; named staff praise for professionalism
Multiple product options: title pledges, unsecured lines of credit, and personal loans
cons: Title loans are secured debt—defaulting risks vehicle repossession, creating transportation risk
Specific APR and rate information not disclosed on location page; competitive rates claimed but not verified
Unsecured personal loans available only in select states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Requires clear vehicle title for title pledges—not accessible to vehicle-free borrowers
Minimal disclosures about loan terms, repayment schedules, or cost comparisons on this location page
best_for: Vehicle owners with fair/poor credit needing same-day emergency cash
Borrowers seeking flexible lines of credit with incremental withdrawal options
Consumers in TN, SC, MS, and other TitleMax service states with minimal credit-based lending alternatives
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners with fair or poor credit seeking immediate emergency cash ($100–$1K+) with same-day approval. The main caveat is that title loans carry repossession risk if not repaid, and specific APRs are not disclosed on this page—borrowers must discuss rates in-store or online before committing.
services: Title Pledge loans secured by vehicle title
Flex Line of Credit (secured and unsecured options)
